concat(
  '<div style="background:#1e1e1e;height:100%;box-sizing:border-box;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden">',
  '<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 12px;background:#252526;border-bottom:1px solid #3d3d3d;flex-shrink:0">',
  '<span style="color:#7ec8e3;font-weight:bold;font-size:13px">&#9889; Pyodide &#8212; Python in Perspective</span>',
  '<span id="pyodide-status" style="color:#ffc107;font-size:11px;margin-left:auto">&#8987; Loading Pyodide (10&#8211;30&#160;MB)&#8230;</span>',
  '</div>',
  '<div style="flex-shrink:0;padding:8px 12px 4px">',
  '<div style="color:#858585;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px">Python code (edit below, then click Run):</div>',
  '<textarea id="pyodide-code" rows="10" style="width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;background:#2d2d2d;color:#d4d4d4;border:1px solid #555;border-radius:3px;font-family:monospace;font-size:12px;padding:6px;resize:vertical"></textarea>',
  '</div>',
  '<div style="flex-shrink:0;padding:0 12px 8px">',
  '<button id="pyodide-run-btn" disabled onclick="if(window.__pyodideRun)window.__pyodideRun()" style="background:#007acc;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:3px;padding:5px 16px;font-size:12px;cursor:not-allowed;opacity:0.5">&#9654; Run Python</button>',
  '</div>',
  '<div style="flex-shrink:0;padding:0 12px 6px">',
  '<div style="color:#858585;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px">Output / stdout:</div>',
  '<pre id="pyodide-output" style="background:#252526;color:#d4d4d4;border:1px solid #3d3d3d;border-radius:3px;padding:6px;margin:0;font-size:11px;max-height:110px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-all">Initializing&#8230;</pre>',
  '</div>',
  '<div style="flex-shrink:0;padding:0 12px 6px">',
  '<div style="color:#858585;font-size:10px;margin-bottom:3px">Chart (pandas result &#8594; array of rows):</div>',
  '<div id="pyodide-chart" style="background:#1a2332;border:1px solid #3d3d3d;border-radius:3px;height:180px;overflow:hidden"></div>',
  '</div>',
  '<div style="flex-shrink:0;padding:0 12px 4px;color:#445566;font-size:9px">teal = y &nbsp; orange dashed = rolling avg</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">',
  '</div>'
)
